evals.name: ani-matrix
evals.prompt: Compute pairwise whole-genome ANI across all the genome FASTAs in ~/Desktop/vivarium/tests/data/genomes/ and give me the result as a matrix. Also tell me whether PB002_L5 and S_vesiculosa_M7 are the same species.

evals.name: synteny
evals.prompt: Align the genome ~/Desktop/vivarium/tests/data/genomes/PB002_L5.fna against ~/Desktop/vivarium/tests/data/genomes/S_vesiculosa_M7.fna and summarize how collinear / syntenic they are.

evals.name: orthology-scaffold
evals.prompt: I want the core, accessory, and strain-unique genes (orthogroups) across the four genomes in ~/Desktop/vivarium/tests/data/genomes/. Set up the analysis for me.
